title: CBB Rulebook Volume 1 General Requirements Module Chapter GR-6 Open Banking
summary: Requires retail banks to support account access for authorised open banking providers while ensuring customer consent and compliance with the Personal Data Protection Law.

theme_notes.data_privacy.personal_data_protection: Regulates customer-consented data access under open banking.
theme_notes.data_privacy.data_governance_open_data: Requires retail banks to share customer account data through open banking channels.
theme_notes.digital_finance.open_banking: Open banking obligations for conventional retail banks.
